reviews.review_description: Either make the game available to reinstall or give us a refund. Poor service!!!

I have my Xbox one wireless controller connected to my Note 8 and it works fine in any other game I play but not in this game. Your controller options show the trigger buttons for gas and brake (if I recall correctly) but instead START is gas and BACK is brake and A is to use the weapon/power up. This is extremely awkward and makes no sense. Please fix the gamepad controls.
Only just playable on a Galaxy S7 Edge, the sound stutterers so much it's really distracting. Otherwise just as I remember it from Gameboy Color.
Needs multiplayer ASAP !!!
What a great game  and very addictive.  Graphics are fantastic and the presentation is spot on.  Thanks for making this work great on the note 4.

reviews.review_title: Broken on phones using higher resolution
reviews.review_description: This ran OK on my S7, but not on my S10.  It renders incorrectly, with the screen low and to the left...  and the pointer mislocated (so if looking straight ahead, it is in the center of this smaller window, to your left and below).  This ought to be a simple fix...  and as a paid app, it's inexcusable not to provide that fix.

Really great and fun game.  Controls are really smooth and easy.  It can be challenging at times to get three stars on some levels but that makes it more fun.  Only complaint would be that you lose sight of your vehicle when it goes behind some objects.  But still a 5 star game.
The second I saw this game I new I needed to buy it. Me and my sisters used to play this game on the Playstation and playing it in VR made all those memories come flooding back. I love this game!

I just had 5 mins of time to kill so i had a go on this OMG vr micro great fun.....1 thing to say.....didnt see an option for multiplayer and if there is no multiplayer you are crazy cause this game needs multiplayer this could be a great money maker ... brilliant
I though It would be an fps racer but it's more like someone standing and controlling small cars with his head movement which is very boring

As a huge fan of the Micro Machines series, this game delivers... well, almost. The levels are pretty good and the gameplay is adequate, but the graphics are not what they could be. Stereoscopy (3D) is almost nonexistent, which takes away from the immersion. At least there's a decent selection of levels, but can't but feel a little disappointed.

This game will keep you going for a while. I do miss the extras the regular non VR game has, like the Battle Arena and Nerf weapons or GI Joe vehicles. Would to love that added in the future. Too those complaining about not having a rear view or inside car view which in their opinion doesn't make it real VR, you probably don't get the concept of VR. Standing there, looking over the table makes it as real as it gets when playing with RC cars on a tabletop. Other views wouldn't make it as real as it looks now. I definitely would say BUY!!! It's tons of fun and sometimes even hard to play. Works great with the Ipega 9017 controller.

Read several reviews about the same issue. Start screen is completely off center and image is not rendered well. Only half visible and somewhere in the far left /down corner of the screen( in my case) . It.'s unresponsive as well, no way to press exit ot get past the start screen. Any plans to solve this?
Impossible de jouer, au premier niveau l'image saccade tellement que l'image ne ce charge j'aimais complètement... Samsung galaxy s9+.. Je veux un remboursement
Does not fully work with Xbox One S bluetooth controller.
not bad , not  bad at all
This game would be perfect if it could support multiplayer and was more like the ps1 game
Driving around a kitchen table using your head to Steer just isn't exciting

reviews.review_title: Thank you update for the fix!
reviews.review_description: Nabbed this game when it came out and I had a hard time loading it. Had to click it 8 times for it to even play. Thanks to this update, that problem is now over. Kudos!

reviews.review_title: VR adds nothing to this game.
reviews.review_description:
There really is no reason for this game to be ported to VR. It is fun, but it is just as fun playing the non VR version Toybox Turbos on the PC. Can't really recommend it.

Maybe if it had a first person perspective or something else it could justify a VR port but as it is you are just looking at a normal game through a VR headset.
